# Interface: ServeOptions

Defined in: core/specification/website/serve.adapter.ts:10

Options for the local server started by `specification.website()`.

## Properties

### command

```ts
command: string;
```

Defined in: core/specification/website/serve.adapter.ts:12

Shell command that starts the site. Receives the chosen port as `PORT`.

***

### port?

```ts
optional port?: number;
```

Defined in: core/specification/website/serve.adapter.ts:14

Fixed port. Default: an OS-assigned free port, injected as `PORT`.

***

### ready?

```ts
optional ready?: string;
```

Defined in: core/specification/website/serve.adapter.ts:16

Path polled until it answers with any HTTP status. Default `/`.

***

### timeout?

```ts
optional timeout?: number;
```

Defined in: core/specification/website/serve.adapter.ts:18

Readiness budget in milliseconds. Default 30 000.
